name: armoured-souls
description: Repo-level tooling: git hooks via husky + lint-staged. Backend and frontend live under app/.

app/backend/**/*.ts: bash -c 'cd app/backend && for f in "$@"; do pnpm exec eslint --fix --no-warn-ignored "${f#app/backend/}" || exit 1; done' --
app/frontend/**/*.{ts,tsx}: bash -c 'cd app/frontend && for f in "$@"; do pnpm exec eslint --fix --no-warn-ignored "${f#app/frontend/}" || exit 1; done' --
